name: Stuffed Pork Chops II
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill the pockets of pork chops with your favorite bread stuffing and secure with toothpicks.
2. Brown pork chops in a skillet on top of a conventional surface unit.
3. Place chops in a shallow, 3-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic baking dish. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 15 minutes. Pork should always be cooked until well-done.
